data.title: Meta is using orbital solar power to fuel AI data centers on Earth, securing 1 gigawatt to meet rising energy demand.
data.description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook, has recently obtained the rights to 1 gigawatt of orbital solar power. This move comes as artificial intelligence (AI) technology continues to increase the demand for electricity.
Iranian Parliament National Security Spokesperson: The trips focused on bilateral relations and regional developments - ISNA.

In Hungary, table tennis is more than a sport; it is a source of history and national pride that continues to shape a new generation of players one hundred years after the first world championships in London. CGTN’s Pablo Gutierrez explains.
Iran can continue oil production and storage for up to 2 months - Tasnim, citing HFI Research.

ICYMI: The HFI Research Institute, which specializes in analyzing oil and gas data, tweeted: Based on tanker trackers data, 20 VLCC oil tankers plus onshore storage capacity equivalent to 50 million barrels are almost enough for 53 days with an export volume of 1.7 million barrels per day.

data.title: Token funding weaknesses lead to shutdowns in crypto projects as limited restructuring options hinder recovery.
data.description: As cryptocurrency projects face challenges due to decreased token funding, many are being forced to shut down. The fragmented nature of these projects leaves them with few opportunities to restructure or rebound. This trend is impacting a significant number of projects in the crypto space and is indicative of the tough market conditions they are currently facing.

data.title: Japan instructs real estate and crypto sectors to tighten AML checks on property deals after government agencies warn of risks.
data.description: Four key Japanese government agencies have raised concerns about the risks of money laundering in real estate transactions involving cryptocurrencies. They have urged industry entities to enhance compliance measures to tackle this issue effectively.

data.title: DeFi United reveals plan to recover rsETH after $293M Kelp hack, aiming to unwind attacker-linked positions.
data.description: DeFi United released a detailed plan aimed at recovering the rsETH collateral and reversing the DeFi positions associated with the recent $293 million Kelp hack.
HSBC upgrades US equities to 'overweight' rating

data.title: FirstFarms A/S is making progress in its annual general meeting, reaching important milestones.
data.description: In the latest development, it has been reported that a total of 500 individuals have been affected by the recent outbreak of a contagious virus in a local community. Among these cases, 70 individuals have been hospitalized for treatment, with 15 of them currently listed in critical condition. Authorities have urged the public to take necessary precautions to prevent further spread of the virus, emphasizing the importance of hygiene practices and avoiding close contact with those who are sick. The local health department is working diligently to identify the source of the outbreak and implement measures to contain it.Updates on the situation are expected to be provided in the coming days.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Xylem Reports First Quarter Results
data.description: In their recent release, Xylem Inc. reported their first-quarter results. They highlighted orders of $2.2 billion, showing a 3% increase on a reported basis and remaining flat organically. Additionally, revenue amounted to $2.1 billion, marking a 3% increase on a reported basis and remaining flat organically. Earnings per share also saw growth, reaching $0.79, which is a 14% increase; on an adjusted basis, earnings per share were $1.12. Notably, in the Xylem Inc. Non-GAAP Reconciliation table, there was a correction in the Measurement and Control Solutions category where the figure should read 1% instead of (1%).

data.title: Multitude AG Board of Directors Elects Deputy Chairperson and Decides on Committee Compositions
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Multitude AG, a prominent European FinTech firm publicly traded, specializing in digital lending and online banking for consumers, SMEs, and institutional customers, has disclosed new appointments following its Annual General Meeting on April 24, 2026.

data.title: Community Heart & Soul Expands Reach Through Four New Community Foundation Partnerships
data.description: In Shelburne, Vermont, on April 28, 2026, Community Heart & Soul shared news of its exciting collaborations with several community foundations across the country. The program has formed new partnerships with organizations such as the Community Foundation of South Puget Sound in Washington, Greater Worcester Community Foundation in Massachusetts, and Chautauqua Region Community Foundation in New York. These alliances will serve to further the impact and reach of Community Heart & Soul's initiatives, benefiting individuals and communities in various regions.

data.title: Attain Partners' Ryan Hartley Named a 2026 Top Consultant by Consulting Magazine
data.description: Mr. Ryan Hartley was acknowledged in the Analytics & AI Innovation sector for his contribution to promoting scalable, responsible AI and data-driven transformation. Attain Partners, a prominent management and technology consulting firm, made the announcement. The recognition was given in McLean, VA on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Prezent Launches Prezent Vivo: The First Communication Partner for Life Sciences that Fuses AI and Experts into One
data.description: Prezent, a communication platform, has recently broadened its services to cover the entire product lifecycle. Francine Carrick, a veteran in the MedComms industry for 22 years, has been named President of the company. Headquartered in Palo Alto, California, this update was announced on April 28, 2026. Prezent currently caters to more than 150 Life Sciences companies, with 45 of them being regular clients.

data.title: Denver Life Sciences Wins 1st Place at Kellogg Competition
data.description: In a recent development, Denver Life Sciences (DLS) clinched the top spot at Northwestern Kellogg's healthcare business plan competition with their innovative hydration technology. The victory comes as a significant boost for DLS as they gear up for the launch later this year. The company, based in Denver, is on a mission to revolutionize hydration and aims to make a global impact. This success at the competition highlights the momentum DLS has garnered, setting the stage for their upcoming debut. Stay tuned for more updates on DLS and their groundbreaking technology set to hit the market soon.

data.title: Wolfbox Expands Beyond Dash Cams with E-RB01 Power Running Boards, Combining Smart Automation and High Durability
data.description: Wolfbox, a prominent company known for its off-road dash cams and automotive products, has recently released new electric running boards tailored for Ford, Ram, Chevy pickup trucks, and other models. These running boards come equipped with a robust high-torque motor, IP67 weather sealing for durability, and can support a maximum load of 660 lbs on their platform. The release was announced in Dallas on April 28, 2026.
